message:
feat(fsqlite-vfs): expand Unix VFS with full file locking, SHM, and memory VFS fixes

Major expansion of the VFS layer:

- unix.rs: add ~760 lines implementing POSIX advisory file locking
  (shared/reserved/pending/exclusive), fsync with fallback strategies,
  file size management, sector size detection, device characteristics
  reporting, and the full SHM (shared memory) protocol for WAL mode
  including mmap-based region management
- shm.rs: add SHM region helper types and lock-state tracking for
  the WAL shared-memory coordination protocol
- memory.rs: fix in-memory VFS to properly handle truncation and
  sector alignment
- Cargo.toml: add libc and nix dependencies for POSIX syscall bindings

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
